signals.headline: US Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Begins; Iran Vows Response but Reaches Out for Deal Talks Amid Fragile Ceasefire | NO |
signals.raw:
US Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Begins; Iran Vows Response but Reaches Out for Deal Talks Amid Fragile Ceasefire | NO | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump ordered a US blockade of Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz, effective ~8 hours ago, to force Iran to fully open the strait and accept permanent ceasefire conditions after failed weekend talks.[1][3]  
Iran condemned the blockade as "piracy"

signals.headline: South Korea Bank of Korea Holds Interest Rate at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Bank of Korea Holds Interest Rate at 2.5% Amid Iran War Inflation Risks | NO | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board unanimously decided on April 10, 2026, to keep its benchmark rate unchanged at 2.5% for the seventh consecutive month, citing surging oil prices from the Iran conflict, a weakening won (near 1,520 per USD), and inflation rising above the 2% target
